title: Power Rule (Exponents)
aria_label: open parenthesis a to the m close parenthesis to the n equals a to the m times n
notes: When raising a power to another power, keep the base and multiply the exponents.
This is different from the product rule — here the exponents multiply, not add.
Extends to products inside parentheses: (ab)ⁿ = aⁿbⁿ.
Common mistake: (x²)³ = x⁶, not x⁵. Multiply, don't add, when raising a power to a power.
applications: Expanding polynomial expressions involving powers of binomials (preparation for binomial theorem).
Working with scientific notation raised to a power.

es.title: Regla de la Potencia (Exponentes)
notes: Al elevar una potencia a otra potencia, conserva la base y multiplica los exponentes.
Esto es diferente de la regla del producto — aquí los exponentes se multiplican, no se suman.
Se extiende a productos entre paréntesis: (ab)ⁿ = aⁿbⁿ.
También se extiende a cocientes: (a/b)ⁿ = aⁿ/bⁿ.
Error común: (x²)³ = x⁶, no x⁵. Multiplica, no sumes, al elevar una potencia a una potencia.

ht.title: Règ Pisans (Ekspozán)
notes: Lè w leve yon pisans nan yon lòt pisans, kenbe baz la epi miltipliye ekspozán yo.
Sa diferan de règ pwodwi a — isit ekspozán yo miltipliye, pa ajoute.
Etann pou pwodwi anndan parantèz: (ab)ⁿ = aⁿbⁿ.
Erè komen: (x²)³ = x⁶, pa x⁵. Miltipliye, pa ajoute, lè w leve yon pisans nan yon pisans.
